category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Gemini Project client written in Rust with NCurses; maintainer project page describes Asuka as a command-line client for the Gemini Protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses Asuka in the SourceHut project URL; maintainer project page lists the project as asuka.
docs_sources: Official SourceHut repository is the best official documentation surface identified for Asuka.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is from git.sr.ht/~julienxx/asuka; maintainer project page links https://git.sr.ht/~julienxx/asuka as the Asuka project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and maintainer project page describe a Rust NCurses command-line Gemini client.
